title: Unleashing Spooky Creativity: Halloween Prompts for Illustrate Ai
description:
Ready to get spooky with art? Dive into the world of Halloween characters using Illustrate Ai from DesignBundles. Whether you're a fan of cute little witches or spine-chilling ghouls, I've got some amazing prompts to jumpstart your creativity! 

Join our community: https://www.facebook.com/groups/pixaromacrafts/
transcript: Hey there, welcome to a new video. Today, I've got some awesome prompts for you that you can use with Illustrate AI on design bundles.  I've got a list of Halloween characters ready. You can use these ideas as your base prompt and then decide how you want it, cute, scary, or downright spooky.  Feel free to add more details to your prompt like art styles, mood, or lighting.  But don't stop there. Think about creating your own unique monsters. How about monsters inspired by vegetables or trees?  Imagine turning everyday objects into wild creatures. Stick around and let's explore together. Up on the left, you'll see the art style I've chosen.  I'm a big fan of digital art. Right below that is the positive prompt.
